title: wkappbot-sdk daily system heal checklist
desc: Daily midnight health check for wkappbot-sdk + cross-repo audit. Sections: (E) Eye ctx%, (C) CI SDK+Core, (S) briefing schedule, (G) git clean, (L) license, (P) suggest backlog, (R) release, (X) cross-repo: all-repo CI, GitHub Pages reachability, README media assets, releases, PayPal secrets. Script: D:/GitHub/wkappbot-sdk/scripts/daily-heal.sh.
steps: 2. Read output -- each section has check or cross icon

C (CI heal loop): When any CI failures exist, enter a fix loop using Claude Code /loop or autonomous repeat until all non-infra failures are resolved. Rules: (1) NEVER ask the user -- make the best autonomous choice. (2) For each failing workflow: gh run view --log-failed to read error, identify root cause, fix code/workflow, commit with UTF8NoBOM message, push. (3) Loop: after each push wait ~60s then re-check gh run list. Repeat until all fixable failures pass. (4) Known infra-only failures to SKIP (not block): core-* binary missing (needs private CORE_REPO release), sponsor-license.yml sponsorship event (needs GitHub Sponsors account). (5) Track fixed vs skipped in a summary. (6) If stuck on same error after 2 attempts, file a suggest and move on.

4. Re-run heal script to verify all checks pass. If any check is still failing: do NOT stop -- make the best autonomous choice. For CI failures: enter fix loop (see step 3). For auth/interactive blockers: call ScheduleWakeup(60s) with same prompt for one-shot retry. NEVER wait silently for user input.
5. Workflow name audit (add to weekly check): run 'Get-ChildItem .github/workflows/*.yml | ForEach-Object { (Get-Content .FullName | Select-String " ^name:\)

6. Slack send heal summary. LOOP RULE: this entire checklist MUST run as a /loop until all non-infra issues are resolved. Use ScheduleWakeup(120s) after each push/fix to recheck. Known infra-skip (never loop on these): core-* binary missing (needs private CORE_REPO release), sponsor-license sponsorship event (needs GitHub Sponsors). Exit loop only when latest commit's runs show no fixable failures.

7. Landing page consistency check (kiexpert.github.io/wkappbot-sdk/landing.html): (a) Use wkappbot a11y read to read pricing section -- compare with PRICING.md and SUBSCRIBE.md. Verify CDP price, Sudo price, and Trial tier match. (b) Check landing page link in README.md points to correct URL. (c) Check docs/public/landing.html matches landing page if SDK serves its own. Fix any price or content drift before release.

requirements.expect: outputs markdown with check or cross per section
shows 4 recurring entries for 11:00 and 18:00 briefing and prefetch

author: claude
